source_path: 0. Foundation and pre-product stabilization and codebase setup/0.5.10 â€” Satellite.json
title: Version 0.5.10 â€” Satellite
summary: Five-track delivery (contract / service / surface / data / ops) for this doc:
flowcharts:
flowchart LR
  contract[Contract]
  service[Service]
  surface[Surface]
  data[Data]
  ops[Ops]
  gate[Release gate]

  contract --> gate
  service --> gate
  surface --> gate
  data --> gate
  ops --> gate

contract.text: Documented s3storage satellite queue: Postgres `s3storage_metadata_jobs` via `internal/pgqueue` (not Redis/Asynq).

service.text: `go.mod` toolchain line + `golang:1.23-alpine` with `GOTOOLCHAIN=auto` in Dockerfile so `go mod download` / build can use the required Go version.
`internal/api/router.go`: `X-Request-ID`, session TTL sweeper, avatar `ext` query, complete-on-queue-error still removes upload session.

surface.text: No dashboard MV3/UI change in this patch; satellite serves presigned flows consumed by `contact360.io/app` and workers only.

data.text: Queue durability for metadata jobs: Postgres `s3storage_metadata_jobs` via `internal/pgqueue`; multipart session TTL sweep limits orphan state in memory.

ops.text: `docker-compose.yml` for local Postgres + api + worker; uses **`.env.compose`** (gitignored, copy from `.env.compose.example`) so `docker compose config` does not load a full production `.env`.
